'''''Star Wars'' 18''' is the eighteenth issue of the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series [[Star Wars (2013)|''Star Wars'']]. It was written by [[Brian Wood]], illustrated by [[Stéphane Créty]] and [[Julien Hugonnard-Bert]], and first published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[June 11]], [[2014]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Princess Leia's wedding day has arrived—and so has the Empire! As Darth Vader's fleet bears down on the planet, the Rebels scramble to defend themselves—they have been double crossed!''

==Opening crawl==
{{OpeningCrawl
|name=STAR WARS
|text=As part of a deal with the monarchy of
Arrochar, the Rebel Alliance will use the
planet as its new base, and Princess Leia will
marry Prince Kaspar. But as Leia's wedding
day arrives, Luke Skywalker learns that an
Arrochar general has revealed the Rebels'
presence to the Empire. Narrowly escaping
the Arrochar soldiers, Luke and X-wing pilot
Ardana rush to warn Leia.

In the palace, Leia and Mon Mothma are
alerted to the danger by the Rebel fleet
just as bombs rip through the building and
soldiers attempt to enter Leia's chamber.
Their Arrochar "allies" pose as much of a
threat as the Empire!

As his fleet prepares to attack the Alliance
base, the Imperial admiral in command
reports to Coruscant…}}
